name: Strategic Analysis Job
description: Runs the standard analysis sequence (skill co-occurrence + knowledge graph) using the reasoning backend. Replaces scripts/run_analysis_job.ts. Override context vars mission_id and job_id as needed.

params.instruction: Analyze skill co-occurrence patterns across the Kyberion agent manifest and knowledge graph. Identify which capabilities are most frequently deployed together in missions.
Build a knowledge graph summary from the current mission evidence and agent knowledge base. Identify key concepts, their relationships, and knowledge gaps.

params.message: ✅ [ANALYSIS] Analysis job complete. Results written to active/shared/tmp/analysis-results-{{job_id}}.json
